name: eat_bread
parameters: z.object({ amount: z.number().int().positive().describe("The number of bread pieces to consume") })

name: ranged_attack_nearest_hostile
description: Use bow to shoot the nearest hostile mob, keeping distance while dealing ranged damage

name: kite_bot1
description: Bot2 kites the nearest hostile while Bot1 melees forward
parameters: z.object({ maxTicks: z.number().default(80).describe("Duration of the kiting/melee behavior in server ticks."), preferredDistance: z.number().default(8).describe("The distance to maintain from targets when using a bow."), retreatBlocks: z.number().default(6).describe("The distance to back up after a melee attack to maintain spacing or lead hostiles.") })

name: melee_attack_forward
description: Bot1 melee attacks forward using stone sword while Bot2 kites with bow
parameters: z.object({ target_id: z.number().nullable().describe("The ID of the entity to attack. If null, the bot will target the nearest hostile mob."), weapon: z.string().describe("The name requested weapon item, e.g., 'stone_sword'.") })
